description: Combell is a hosting and infrastructure provider offering domains, web hosting, email, databases, SSL, and related reseller services. Its public API is aimed at resellers managing those resources programmatically.
summary: Combell exposes one documented REST HTTP surface for resellers: the Public API at `https://api.combell.com/v2`, authenticated with an HMAC `Authorization` header built from a control-panel-issued API key and secret plus IP whitelisting.
